creator: fbsd_bugzilla@darthporker.freedom.nl
text:
I have only owned ThinkPads but I'll try disabling TCC.
I don't recall which BIOS I'm currently on but haven't updated since posting my issue on the forums.
I'm currently running 13.0-STABLE #5 stable/13-n245210-3bec9180c9e7 without powerdxx or any other power settings in rc.conf for that matter and my X1 Carbon 7th gen feels pretty warm to the touch.
With coretemp loaded 'sysctl dev.cpu.{0-7}.temperature is sitting above 60.*C most of the time.
Are you guys running your systems with any power settings despite not being able to use P-states?
